title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
problem_statement: Search a target value in a rotated sorted array with distinct elements. Return its index if found, otherwise return -1.
intuition: Determine which half of the rotated array is sorted and decide whether the target lies there.

approaches.name: Binary Search on Rotated Array
approaches.description: At each step, identify the sorted half and restrict search to the half that may contain the target.

interview_qa.q: How do you know which half is sorted?
interview_qa.a: Compare nums[left] and nums[mid]. If left ≤ mid, the left half is sorted; otherwise the right half is sorted.

interview_qa.q: Why check target against the sorted half?
interview_qa.a: The target can only be present in the sorted half if it lies between its endpoints.
